# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind AI Assistant boosts DSA practice with guided problem solving
- Summary: Showcase how CodeGrind’s Azure OpenAI assistant helps users tackle LeetCode-style problems with guided hints, multiple model options, and real-time feedback.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assistant-boosts-dsa-practice
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assistant-boosts-dsa-practice
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-08-codegrind-ai-assistant-boosts-dsa-practice.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind combines interactive coding with AI-assisted problem solving. Users can select the AI model, get step-by-step guidance, and see live feedback as they work through DSA challenges, all within the three-panel editor.
- CTA: Try an AI-assisted challenge now
- Visual brief: A concise 15–20 second spotlight video showing the CodeGrind editor UI: problem prompt on left, code editor center, AI chat on right. Include a quick AI-guided hint pop-up, a model-switch toggle, and a success checkmark animation when a solution passes. End with the CodeGrind logo and a CTA to try AI-assisted problems.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
